query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.variantName, pv.productId, pv.createdAt, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package_boxes pb WHERE pb.variantId = pv.id) as boxCount
FROM product_variants pv 
WHERE pv.productId = 60011 
ORDER BY pv.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
